headline: Carter Worth And Mike Khouw's Microsoft Trade

headline: Cramer Gives His Opinion On United Microelectronics, Palantir And More

headline: 'Fast Money' Picks For March 8
summary: On CNBC's "Fast Money Final Trades," Bonawyn Eison said his final trade is Financial Select Sector SPDR Fund (NYSE: XLF) because its constituents have single-digit to low double-digit valuations.

headline: Elon Musk And His Rise As A 'FinTwit' Influencer
summary: When Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk in 2018 famously tweeted “funding secured” and promised to take Tesla private at $420 a share, investors took notice.

headline: Amazon-backed UK Food Delivery Firm Deliveroo To Offer $69 Million Worth Of Shares To Customers
summary: British online food delivery company Deliveroo has announced that it will make 50 million pounds', or $69 million, worth of shares available to its customers in its upcoming IPO.

headline: Tesla Reaches 6,000 Supercharger Installs In China
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) has now installed 6,000 Supercharger stations across its key market of China.

headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: Lowe's, Microsoft, Vertex Pharmaceuticals, ViacomCBS And More
summary: This weekend's Barron's provides some insight into Cathie Wood, one of Barron's 100 most influential women in the United States this year.
